message:
feat(abi): implement _IO_jump_t vtable with 21 trampolines for indirect dispatch (bd-9chy.15)

- Replace dummy _IO_jump_t byte array with proper struct having 21 function
  pointer slots matching glibc 2.34 layout: __dummy, __dummy2, __finish,
  __overflow, __underflow, __uflow, __pbackfail, __xsputn, __xsgetn,
  __seekoff, __seekpos, __setbuf, __sync, __doallocate, __read, __write,
  __seek, __close, __stat, __showmanyc, __imbue
- Add io_jump_fns module with type aliases for each function pointer
- Implement all 21 trampolines that dispatch to native stdio functions
- Define NATIVE_IO_JUMP_T static with all trampolines wired up
- Initialize _IO_file_jumps and _IO_wfile_jumps with native trampolines
- Update NativeFile::new() to set vtable to NATIVE_IO_JUMP_T
- Add layout tests for _IO_jump_t offsets and trampoline initialization

Also fixes:
- tls.rs: fix corrupted file ending (truncated string + null bytes)
- tls.rs: fix table_lookup return type from *mut u64 to *mut TlsEntry
- tls.rs: fix table_remove return cast from *mut u64 to *mut TlsEntry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
